# Coverage By Mode

Agent modes describe when to use a skill:

- `planning` — design, review, strategy, migration planning, go/no-go
- `coding` — implement, refactor, write tests, apply fixes

## Skills By Mode

- `coding`: 53
- `planning`: 49

- `planning+coding` (both): 37
